text:
I honestly don't know how so many of you, like the VPs, officers and Gen Comm and tech leads (as well as everyone else), have all put in so many hours to keep this society running. Somehow, you've all made every event shine even more than in previous years, and that's something everyone should be incredibly proud of!!
And truly, Jzk for all your efforts. May Allah grant all of us careers that strengthen the Ummah and allow us to show what it means to be Muslim not just in what we say but most importantly through our actions, the intentions of our actions as well as our characters.
